purpose: Phase 0Q supplement after qc-a3-parity infrastructure mapping and measured vintage coverage: corrected harness window policy (PIT vintage authority, 12.3y primary window), reference sleeve proposal for metric measurement, and execution-model decision record. Candidate only; nothing approved; Task 2 stays blocked.

supersedes.phase0q_001_stress_oos_policy_coverage_s: harness_window_policy.json (001 artifacts stay frozen as historical record)

execution_model_decision.rationale: the proven qc-a3-parity pattern (Research notebook + immutable Object Store prefix + drift refusal) replaces the LEAN-CLI-backtest model from lean_harness_spec.md; the harness compute is pure Python, so the local reproducibility leg runs the same module directly without LEAN docker
execution_model_decision.supersedes: lean_harness_spec.md section 4 execution model - recorded here as an explicit architectural decision, not a silent deviation

requirements: no RNG anywhere in the compute path
results emitted in contract v1 job-result format via a runner equivalent to runners/parity.py
